UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. LIU ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. is present. Represented by Manuel Fuentes.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charles Mulieri is present.
Attorney Courtney Pasia representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jean Mileff, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated. (501)
